steps.title: Use the present time signal
steps.content: The phrase to this day shows that beeswax and egg yolk continue to be used now. The subject emulsifiers is plural, so the verb must be present-tense and plural.

steps.title: Reject past-time verbs
steps.content: Choice A is conditional perfect and makes the use hypothetical or completed. Choice B is simple past. Choice C is past progressive. The remaining verb is present-tense plural and fits the ongoing use signaled by to this day. The answer is D.
